infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Medak needs your location to share it with emergency services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Medak uses the camera to help the AI understand the emergency scene.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Medak uses the microphone to listen to the emergency scene and relay information to emergency services.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Medak needs your location to share it with emergency services.
